changes.description: Replaced verbose multi-database skill (PostgreSQL/MySQL/SQLite) with SQLite-focused skill. Added step-by-step workflow, CSV import patterns, normalization guide, query patterns, and JSON output instructions.

Drastically shortened skill to prevent gemini-3-flash from continuing/completing the skill text instead of working on the task. Added explicit directive at end: 'Now start working on the user's task.' Reduced from ~200 lines to ~30 lines of content.
